title: trichocentrum estrellense
intro: Trichocentrum estrellense, also known as the Star Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Trichocentrum estrellense include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Trichocentrum estrellense can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
